g.text: Training starts with unlabeled data, then creates its own targets from the data.
Self-created target: transform x into a pair x -> y_self
Example: "The cat sat on the ___" -> y_self = "mat"
the target was generated during training
Self-supervised: unlabeled data -> generated labels -> supervised-style objective.
No human y is provided; y_self is automatically constructed from x.
